summary: Split M4 evidence across exact-head hosted AI automation, clean-Sandbox manual keyboard proof, and packaged native-only automation after the tauri-driver input boundary was conclusively exhausted.

decisions.decision: Stop attempting to inject packaged Message text through a tauri-driver-owned WebView2 session. Run the complete mocked AC-10 conversation and agent journey in exact-head hosted Playwright, require a clean-Sandbox manual Message-input check under V-5, and restrict packaged automation to native-specific boundaries that do not depend on synthetic text injection: unconfigured-AI zero external egress, MCP default-deny/allow-session, cache, geometry delta, animation, thumbnails, restart, and sensitive-state scanning. Emit schema version 2 with hostedAutomationRequired and manualPackagedInputRequired both true; the verifier fails closed if either requirement is weakened.
decisions.rationale: Exact clean source-bound runs proved WebDriver actions, CDP editing, main-world input events, Unicode SendInput, and physical virtual-key SendInput all fail to commit the controlled Message value only when tauri-driver owns the packaged WebView2 session. The same c1da348 packaged product retained ordinary physical-key input and enabled Send in a networking-disabled clean Sandbox, and the exact hosted M4 journey passed its complete mocked provider path. V-4 assigns AI mock apply-diff to Playwright and V-5 separately requires logged manual ACs and fresh-VM testing. Continuing to mutate the tauri-driver input protocol would be test-looping, not product validation.

testEvidence.criterion: The packaged evidence artifact must describe the native-only scope explicitly, retain native M4 checks, and fail closed unless hosted automation and manual packaged input remain required.
testEvidence.test: Run the packaged walkthrough, retained-artifact verifier, and packaged runner contract suites plus TypeScript and targeted lint.

red.command: Exact clean packaged Windows Sandbox run bound to commit 442c65d63698640c7e037c04e193f0c9460fb466 and tree f9b9db6bc1eb8a86051f1e79e92c07eaaaf5dbfd
red.outcome: RUNTIME RED: physical virtual-key SendInput again reported successful injection but packaged React retained no Message value; the mock received zero requests. Build, cube render, STL export, MCP default-off, MCP Appendix B, endpoint removal, and exact cleanup passed. This conclusively closes synthetic packaged textarea injection.

green.command: npm.cmd test -- --run tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts tests/scripts/m4-packaged-verifier.test.ts tests/scripts/packaged-desktop-evidence.test.ts; npm.cmd run typecheck; npm.cmd exec biome lint <six changed implementation/test files>
green.outcome: GREEN: 74/74 focused tests passed, TypeScript passed, and targeted lint passed. The schema-2 verifier accepts the exact native-only manifest and rejects manualPackagedInputRequired=false. Exact clean guest execution remains required once source-bound.

nearMisses.sought: Exact clean packaged M4 walkthrough with physical virtual-key text injection
nearMisses.confirmation: The exact source, binary, engine, driver, and runtime identities were retained. Native pre-M4 events passed, then Message state did not commit and the mock received zero requests. Host cleanup recorded zero exact Sandbox sessions and removed staging.

questions: No owner decision is required. The split follows V-4, V-5, and V-6 without weakening any AC; exact-head hosted and manual evidence must both exist before release.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
